seoTitle: Orion vs Ormeau — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Orion and Ormeau. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Orion and Ormeau.
heading: Orion vs Ormeau — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Orion, Queensland and Ormeau, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Orion has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ormeau (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Orion or Ormeau safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Orion has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Ormeau scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Orion scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Ormeau scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Orion or Ormeau?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Orion has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
